info.title: Aura API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for the Aura project management system

get.description: Returns active and completed chatbot sessions for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates a new scenario discovery session and triggers initial AI analysis of the database

201.description: Session created with initial AI analysis

get.description: Returns a session with its full message history

post.description: Sends a user message and returns the AI assistant's reply

get.description: Returns all AI scenario policies ordered by last updated

post.description: Re-reads current database state and updates the session context snapshot

get.description: Get task completion analytics for a specific period

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (optional, defaults to period start)

get.summary: Compare current period with previous period
get.description: Get comparison analytics between current and previous period
Get completion rate analytics

get.summary: Get average task completion time statistics
get.description: Get average completion time analytics
Get comprehensive analytics dashboard data

post.summary: Change password (for first login or regular password change)
Set password using invite token (for new users)

get.description: Returns all automated reminder settings and projects with overrides

patch.description: Update days_before schedule and/or active status for a reminder type (admin/hr only)
Set a manual reminder date/frequency for a specific project (admin/hr only)

get.description: Returns audit history of reminder setting changes

post.description: Merges another client into this one, reassigning all projects, estimates, contacts, and history

merge_client_id.description: ID of client to merge from

get.summary: Get financial aggregation across all clients

get.description: Returns the last 100 client change history entries (admin/hr only)

get.summary: Get a secure download URL for a document

post.summary: Create a new estimate and auto-generate a Suggested project

201.description: Estimate created with auto-generated Suggested project

post.summary: Mark a draft estimate as sent

422.description: Estimate is not in draft status
Estimate is not in sent status

get.description: Returns projects with grace periods expiring soon. Secured via N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET bearer token.
Returns paginated invoices with optional filters

post.description: Creates a new invoice. Supports file upload for invoice_document (multipart/form-data).
Updates an invoice. Use multipart/form-data when uploading a new document.

post.summary: Store Jothika API token for current user

delete.summary: Revoke/disconnect Jothika token for current user

get.summary: Check if current user has a valid Jothika token

post.summary: Create reimbursement in Jothika from project expense
Create a custom reimbursement in Jothika

is_cost_of_sales.description: Is this cost of sales? (default: true)

get.description: Returns all OAuth clients (admin only)

post.description: Creates a new OAuth 2.0 client application. Returns client_secret once on creation (admin only).
Generates a new client secret and revokes all existing tokens (admin only, confidential clients only)

get.summary: Get client profitability across all projects

patch.summary: End a time log for a task

get.summary: Get all time logs for a task
Get all active timers for the current user

200.description: List of active time logs with task info

post.description: Attach a file (via direct upload or TUS upload_key) or a URL link to a project

delete.description: Removes a project attachment and deletes the file from S3 if applicable

get.summary: Get all projects belonging to a department

200.description: List of projects for the department

get.summary: Get suggested tasks for a project

post.summary: Create a suggested task for a project

get.summary: Search projects by WhatsApp group ID

get.description: Get collaborators for a project.

post.description: Add collaborators to a project.

delete.summary: Remove a collaborator from a project
delete.description: Remove a collaborator from a project.

post.summary: Grant a grace period for a project
post.description:
Grant a grace period for a project that is missing a PO.
Only users with admin or finance roles may approve a grace period.

post.summary: Issue a provisional PO for a project
post.description:
Issue a provisional PO for a project, allowing work to continue while
awaiting the official PO document.
Only users with admin or hr roles may issue provisional POs.

Manually block a project, setting it to a read-only state.
Only admin and hr users may block projects.

Unblock a manually blocked project.
Only admin and hr users may unblock projects.
Upload a campaign report for a Digital Marketing project.

Approve a campaign report for a Digital Marketing project.
Only admins or users in HR department (Harshani) can approve.

get.description: List all purchase orders assigned to a project.

post.description:
Bulk-assign one or more purchase orders to a project.
Also unlocks the project's PO lock if it was awaiting a PO.

delete.description: Remove a single purchase order from a project.

get.description: Returns expenses for a project. Role-based visibility: admins/hr see all, team-leads see all, staff see own + approved.

post.description: Submit a new expense for a project. Admins/HR/team-leads are auto-approved.
Updates an expense. Use POST with multipart/form-data. Submitter can edit pending; approvers can edit any.

delete.description: Submitter can delete pending; approvers can delete any

post.description: Approves a pending expense (team-lead/hr/admin only)
Rejects a pending expense with an optional reason (team-lead/hr/admin only)

get.description: Returns active (unread) and paginated completed (read) reminders for the authenticated user

delete.description: Removes an override and returns the reminder to its original schedule

patch.description: Override the date and/or frequency of a reminder with an audit trail

get.description: Returns reports with role-based filtering: hr/admin see all, team-lead sees department, staff sees own

post.description: Submit a new report file for approval workflow (multipart/form-data, max 20MB)
Edit a report (owner only, before final HR approval). Use POST with multipart/form-data.
HR final approval (requires TL approval first)
Handles resumable uploads via the TUS protocol. Supports OPTIONS, POST, HEAD, PATCH, and DELETE methods on /uploads/tus/{uploadKey?}.

get.description: Validates the authorization request parameters and returns client info for the consent UI. Public endpoint.

post.description: User approves or denies the OAuth consent screen. Requires Sanctum authentication.
Token endpoint (RFC 6749). Supports authorization_code and refresh_token grant types. Public endpoint — called server-to-server.

get.description: Returns the authenticated resource owner's profile. Bearer token must be an Aurai SSO-issued JWT.

post.description: Revokes an access or refresh token (RFC 7009). Public endpoint.

get.description: Returns the JSON Web Key Set for verifying SSO-issued JWTs. Public endpoint.
Returns the OIDC discovery document (/.well-known/openid-configuration). Public endpoint.

get.summary: Search all models with relations and cross-model filters
Search all models and return grouped results

post.summary: Trigger reindex of all tasks for search
Trigger reindex of all tags for search
Trigger reindex of all projects for search
Trigger reindex of all task comments for search
Trigger reindex of all project groups for search
Trigger reindex of all stages for search
Trigger reindex of all task attachments for search
Trigger reindex of all history entries for search
Trigger reindex of all departments for search
Trigger reindex of all feedback for search
Trigger reindex of all suggested tasks for search
Trigger reindex of all revision histories for search

200.description: List of stages with stage group information

stage_group_id.description: ID of the stage group this stage belongs to

201.description: Stage created with stage group information

200.description: Stage details with stage group information

stage_group_id.description: ID of the stage group this stage belongs to

200.description: Stage updated with stage group information

get.description: Retrieve all stage groups with their associated stages. Stages include their names and stage_group_id.

200.description: List of stage groups with stages

post.description: Create a stage group that can be used to classify stages internally (e.g., Completed, Pending, Active)

project_id.description: Optional project ID to scope the group to a specific project

201.description: Stage group created with empty stages array

get.description: Retrieve a specific stage group with all its associated stages that include stage_group_id

put.description: Update a stage group's name, description, or project association

delete.description: Delete a stage group. Note: Associated stages will have their stage_group_id set to null

get.description: Returns paginated list of suppliers with optional search filter (admin/hr only)

get.summary: Download or track download of an attachment

post.summary: Start a task (move to designated stage)
Bulk update tasks (Assignee and Due Date)
Complete a task with optional comments.user and attachments
Move a task early and notify department team lead

get.summary: Get user efficiency trends over time

get.description: Returns paginated history log for a specific task

post.description: Submits a document to N8N for AI-powered task extraction

file.description: PDF, Word, text, spreadsheet, or image (max 20MB)

post.description: Public endpoint called by N8N with extracted tasks. Secured via bearer secret.

get.description: Polling endpoint for task import results. Returns status=pending or the extracted tasks.

post.description: Generates a TOTP secret and QR code SVG for the authenticated user
Verifies the TOTP code and activates 2FA, returning recovery codes
Disables 2FA after verifying the user's current password
Returns the current 2FA recovery codes after password verification
Generates new 2FA recovery codes after password verification (2FA must be enabled)

get.summary: Check if user exists by email
Get user's profile image from Mattermost

404.description: User not found or no image

get.description: Returns whether Xero is connected and basic metadata
Generates and returns the Xero OAuth2 authorization URL for the user to begin the OAuth flow
Public endpoint. Handles the Xero OAuth2 callback, exchanges code for tokens, and redirects to frontend.

post.description: Syncs Xero Contacts to local Clients (admin/hr only)
Syncs Xero Suppliers to local suppliers table (admin/hr only)
Syncs Xero Quotes to local Estimates (admin/hr only)
Syncs Xero Invoices to local Projects (admin/hr only)

get.description: Returns available Xero Purchase Orders not yet linked to a project
Returns the Zoho OAuth authorization URL
Public endpoint. Handles Zoho OAuth callback, exchanges code for tokens.
Returns whether Zoho Mail is connected and lists mail accounts
Returns mail folders for the connected account
Returns messages in a specific mail folder
Returns full content and metadata of a specific email

post.description: Sends an email through the connected Zoho Mail account
Uploads a file attachment for use in a Zoho Mail message (max 10MB)
Removes the stored Zoho OAuth tokens, disconnecting the mail integration

get.summary: Redirect to Mattermost with magic link
get.description: Generates a magic link and redirects the browser to Mattermost
Returns a one-time magic link URL for Mattermost auto-login (expires in 5 minutes)
Generates auto-login URL and redirects the browser to Mattermost
Returns a URL for Mattermost plugin auto-login (expires in 60 seconds)

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Task completion analytics and reporting endpoints
